div.p: Data Flow: Arbitrary chunk bytes -> SHA-256 block stream

p.em: (buf content now stale - buf_len is the

div.p: RETURN EARLY (all len bytes consumed into buf; no complete block yet) ctx->buf_len in [1, 63]

p.em: (passes pointer directly - no memcpy into buf)

div.p: EXIT Invariants restored: ctx->buf_len in [0, 63] ctx->total_bits = total Σ bits

Worked Example: ctx->buf_len = 10 on entry, len = 100 Step 0: total_bits += 800 Phase 1: need=54, fill buf -> buf_len=64 -> compress, buf_len=0, i=54 Phase 2: 54+64=118 > 100 -> skip loop Phase 3: rem = 46 -> ctx->buf_len=46
data: [--- 54 ---|--- 0 complete blocks ---|--- 46 ---] Phase 1 Phase 3 i=0->54 i=54->100
